mapper.insert:
SELECT SQ_ABUSE_MST.NEXTVAL AS MST_SEQ FROM DUAL
/* abuseMapper.insertAbuseInfo */ INSERT INTO MSP_ABUSE_MST ( MST_SEQ, CONTRACT_NUM, OPEN_YN, REASON, REASON_DESC, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{mstSeq}, #{contractNum}, #{openYn}, #{reason}, #{reasonDesc}, #{sessionUserId}, SYSDATE )

/* abuseMapper.insertAbuseImeiInfo */ INSERT INTO MSP_ABUSE_IMEI( IMEI_SEQ, MST_SEQ, IMEI, REG_YN, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM )VALUES( SQ_ABUSE_IMEI.NEXTVAL, #{mstSeq}, #{imei}, 'Y', #{sessionUserId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: /* abuseMapper.getAbuseImeiList */ SELECT IMEI FROM MSP_ABUSE_IMEI WHERE MST_SEQ = #{mstSeq} AND REG_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY IMEI_SEQ
mapper.update: /* abuseMapper.updateAbuseInfo */ UPDATE MSP_ABUSE_MST SET OPEN_YN = #{openYn}, REASON = #{reason}, REASON_DESC = #{reasonDesc}, RVISN_ID = #{sessionUserId}, RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE MST_SEQ = #{mstSeq}
mapper.insert: /* abuseMapper.insertAbuseInfoHist */ INSERT INTO MSP_ABUSE_HIST( HIST_SEQ, MST_SEQ, CONTRACT_NUM, OPEN_YN, REASON, REASON_DESC, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM )SELECT SQ_ABUSE_HIST.NEXTVAL, MST_SEQ, CONTRACT_NUM, OPEN_YN, REASON, REASON_DESC, #{sessionUserId}, SYSDATE FROM MSP_ABUSE_MST WHERE MST_SEQ = #{mstSeq}
mapper.select: /* abuseMapper.getContractInfo */ SELECT SUB.CONTRACT_NUM ,SUB.SUB_LINK_NAME ,FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0003', SUB.SUB_STATUS) AS SUB_STATUS_NM ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE,'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS LST_COM_ACTV_DATE ,FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0007', REQ.ON_OFF_TYPE) AS ON_OFF_TYPE_NM ,REQ.REQ_BUY_TYPE_NM ,REQ.OPER_TYPE_NM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB , MSP_REQUEST_DTL REQ WHERE SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = REQ.CONTRACT_NUM AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND ROWNUM = 1
